meta.title: KC27 — Codified Internal Organization on All Naming Schemas
meta.enrichment_note: v2.0.0 — enriched from live Google Doc KC27 Admissibility (doc_id 1Ad9mXq0127AVwdteuFRIs0x_rzDeo9Y6h_-eektnmHQ) with full 27-chapter extraction, 16 appendix organs, master compression seed, C2 proof-index preimage, and terminal extraction atlas

canonical_name_law.description: CanonicalName(x) = Registered(x) ∧ Typed(x) ∧ Addressed(x) ∧ Digested(x) ∧ Witnessed(x) ∧ Replayable(x) ∧ CrossOutputStable(x)

predicates.Registered: Entity has a unique ID in the naming registry
predicates.Typed: Entity has a declared type (shard, edge, node, capsule, mirror, etc.)
predicates.Addressed: Entity has a crystal coordinate (element x mode x archetype x octave)
predicates.Digested: Entity has a content hash/digest for integrity verification
predicates.Witnessed: Entity's creation/modification has been witnessed by an observer
predicates.Replayable: Entity's full state can be reconstructed from its lineage
predicates.CrossOutputStable: Entity's name is stable across all output media (docs, git, MCP)

predicates.LookupComplete: All forward and reverse lookups resolve correctly
predicates.RouteBound: Entity is bound to at least one metro line route
predicates.ReserveHonest: Any future/reserve claims are explicitly marked as unresolved

admissibility_engine.description: Kernel-to-Crown promotability chain for 4x4 DLS quantum crystal
admissibility_engine.topic_lock: Extract, prove, compile, validate, compress, and reseed the complete admissibility chain for the 4x4 Diagonal Latin Square Quantum Crystal
admissibility_engine.five_pass_chain: Kernel Pass -> Cell Pass -> Lineage Pass -> Map Pass -> Crown Pass
admissibility_engine.governing_law: Admissible(x) = KernelClosed(x) AND CellCompilable(x) AND LineageClosed(x) AND MapReplayValid(x)

four_faces.Cloud: Lawful multiplicity fiber: F_{z,w} != empty iff z equiv w mod 2, |F_{z,w}| = 2
four_faces.Fractal: Exact replay via digitwise lift: L_{4^m}(r,c)-1 = sum 4^t l4(r_t,c_t)

next_seeds: Freeze the three open bridge functions by role-stable typing and witness discipline
Close the first replay-certified C2 lineage
Promote map legality only after upstream replay closure
Run crown admission only on admissible objects
Re-enter KC27 with the compressed seed rather than replanning from scratch

c2_proof_index.description: C2 chooser-lineage proof-index preimage for replay certification
c2_proof_index.manifest_side: Byte-real enough to pin its carried digest
c2_proof_index.proof_side: Schema-real enough to pin its C2 row shape, but not yet digest-real enough to compute D_proof
execution_order: materialize FinalLedgerDigest, FinalPlanDigest, BudgetTraceDigest, ConflictCheckDigest, RouteCheckDigest

higher_carrier_ladder.separation_law: These three calculi commute only when kept separate

naming_types.metro_line: XX -- two-letter metro line code (Sa, Wr, Ac, Me, Mt, Bw, Cc, Dl, Omega)
naming_types.appendix_code: AppX(tt)_4 -- base-4 coded appendix organ address

repair_field.description: Book VI -- Inverse Search and Repair Field
failure_modes: Stale digest (content changed, hash not updated)
Live cell mistaken for replay-certified lineage
repair_operators: DISAMBIGUATE -- split ambiguous entity into distinct shards
RESIDUALIZE -- typed deferral with defect label
regime_conditions: REPAIR when single predicate fails and entity is still reachable
UPGRADE when entity needs new type/address after structural change
RETIRE when entity is no longer reachable from any live route
